title: El disputado voto del Sr. Cayo
original_title: El disputado voto del señor Cayo
overview: Based on Miguel Delibes novel. Rafael Corral, socialist member, decide to attend to the funeral of a friend although they had recomended him not to go for politic reasons. He finds there some friends and talking with them makes him to change his mind.
